timeline.title: Age of Heroes
timeline.description: Legends of Bran the Builder and the First Men define the early age of Westeros.
timeline.politicalShift: Northern clans hold sway over the frozen lands.

timeline.title: The Long Night
timeline.description: The White Walkers and the Others descend upon the world of men.
timeline.politicalShift: The realms unite against the dead.

timeline.title: Aegon's Conquest
timeline.description: Aegon Targaryen unites the Seven Kingdoms with dragonfire.

timeline.title: Dance of the Dragons
timeline.description: Sister against sister as dragons tear the realm apart.
timeline.politicalShift: The dragonline fractures and the realm bleeds.

timeline.title: Blackfyre Rebellions
timeline.description: The Blackfyres challenge the Targaryen line with swords and ambition.
timeline.politicalShift: The realm is unsettled by succession feuds.

timeline.title: Robert's Rebellion
timeline.description: The last great rebellion breaks the Targaryen hold.

timeline.title: War of the Five Kings
timeline.description: The realm fractures after the death of King Robert.
timeline.politicalShift: The Seven Kingdoms are divided and bloodied.

timeline.title: Events of House of the Dragon
timeline.description: The Targaryen civil war threatens the future of the Iron Throne.

timeline.title: Events of Game of Thrones
timeline.description: The final winter and the struggle for the throne reach their climax.
timeline.politicalShift: The realm is transformed by fire and ice.

characters.name: Jon Snow
characters.bio: The King in the North and a sworn defender of the realm.

characters.name: Daenerys Targaryen
characters.bio: The dragon queen who sought to free the world from tyrants.

characters.name: Tyrion Lannister
characters.bio: The cleverest man in Westeros, master of strategy and wit.

characters.name: Arya Stark
characters.bio: A faceless assassin who journeys across the known world.

dragons.name: Drogon
dragons.description: The largest and most fearsome of Daenerys's dragons.

dragons.name: Vhagar
dragons.description: The oldest and largest dragon of the Dance of the Dragons.

dragons.name: Syrax
dragons.description: The mount of Rhaenyra Targaryen, bright and swift.

battles.name: The Battle of the Trident
battles.summary: The decisive clash where Robert Baratheon defeats Rhaegar Targaryen.

battles.name: The Battle of Blackwater
battles.summary: The Lannister fleet and army defend King's Landing from Stannis.

battles.name: The Battle of Winterfell
battles.summary: A turning point in the final war against the dead.

castles.name: Winterfell
castles.description: The ancient seat of House Stark, crowned by a massive keep.
castles.feature: A living history of the North

castles.name: Castle Black
castles.description: The fortress of the Night's Watch on the edge of the world.
castles.feature: Guarding the realm from the dead

castles.name: Dragonstone
castles.description: The ancient volcanic keep of House Targaryen.
castles.notable: The place of fire and birth of dragons

locations.name: Winterfell
locations.description: The ancestral seat of House Stark, rich in history and buried kings.
events: The War of the Five Kings

locations.name: King's Landing
locations.description: The capital of the Seven Kingdoms, where crowns are forged and broken.

locations.name: Dragonstone
locations.description: A black volcanic fortress, cradle of dragons and Targaryen ambition.

locations.name: The Wall
locations.description: A colossal barrier built to keep the dead beyond the realm.
